theme: Dark and Light Mode (Elegant, Black, White, Gold)

rules: Use Outfit for dashboard titles, KPI metric numbers, and main section headers. Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight).
Use Manrope for tables, forms, sidebar navigation, and body text. Use regular letter spacing.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards and main container paddings.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Grid columns: 1 on mobile, 2 on tablet, 4 on desktop for KPIs. Use the 'Control Room' dense bento grid strategy for the dashboard.
spacing_and_layout.sidebar: Collapsible sidebar. Fixed width on desktop, hidden on mobile with hamburger menu. Sidebar should have a dark, sleek appearance in dark mode and clean white in light mode.

components.card: Solid surface with 1px subtle border. No heavy drop shadows in dark mode. Soft shadow-sm in light mode.
components.button: Primary buttons use the gold accent color. Hover state must be a lighter hue. Focus rings should use the gold color.
components.table: Manrope font. Clean lines. Search and filter inputs above every table. Include pagination.
components.forms: Use Shadcn forms. Inputs should have subtle borders and gold focus rings.
components.modal: Modern modals with backdrop-blur for forms (POS, Add Customer, Add Service).
components.toast: Use Sonner for toast notifications. Clean, minimal, and elegant.
components.empty_state: Design distinct empty states for tables/lists without data. Use a muted icon and prompt to 'Add New'.
components.loading_state: Use skeleton loaders for tables and charts instead of full-page spinners.

logo.description: Minimalist gold monogram logo for Mulya Salon. Use in sidebar header.

login_background.description: Cinematic luxury salon interior for the login/auth page background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize Tailwind CSS with the provided color palette mapping to CSS variables for theming (light/dark mode).
Implement a persistent layout with a Sidebar Navigation containing all requested menus (Dashboard, Kasir, Booking, Pelanggan, Stylist, Layanan, Produk, Inventori, Laporan, Pengaturan).
Implement the Dashboard view with a top row of 4 KPI cards: Total Transactions, Total Bookings, Total Customers, Total Revenue.
Include a Revenue Chart using Recharts in the Dashboard.
Include 'Recent Bookings' and 'Recent Transactions' tables in the Dashboard.
Implement Dark Mode toggle in the top navigation bar.
Ensure all interactive and key informational elements have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., data-testid='sidebar-dashboard-link').
Use Shadcn UI components (Card, Table, Dialog, Input, Button, DropdownMenu) and customize them to fit the luxury theme.
Ensure mobile responsiveness: Sidebar collapses to a hamburger menu, and grids adjust to single columns.
